source.definition: to be present or to have actual being

explanation.sourceText: The English word "exist" comes from the Latin verb "existere", which is composed of "ex-" meaning "out" and "sistere" meaning "to stand", originally meaning "to stand out, to be present".
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „exist“ provine din verbul latin „existere“, format din „ex-” care înseamnă „afară” și „sistere” care înseamnă „a sta”, având inițial sensul de „a ieși în evidență, a fi prezent”.

source.additional: Regular verb. It is frequently used in philosophical and everyday contexts to describe the presence or reality of something.

target.definition: a fi prezent sau a exista

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian verb "a exista" derives directly from the Latin "existere" and carries the same meaning: "to be, to exist, to be present."
explanation.targetText: Verbul românesc „a exista“ derivă direct din latină, din „existere“, având același sens: „a fi, a exista, a fi prezent“.

target.additional: Regular first conjugation verb (-a). In Romanian, it is used to describe the existence or presence of things or persons.

examples.sourceText: She has existed for many years.
Once, this place did not exist.
I will exist in the future.
I would exist if I could fulfill my dreams.
examples.targetText: Aș exista dacă aș putea să-mi împlinesc visele.

examples.sourceText: The existing problem must be solved.
By existing, she searched for her identity.

learningTips.text: The Romanian verb "a exista" sounds very similar to the English "exist"—both come from the same Latin root. Think of "exist" as "to stand out" or "to be present" to remember the meaning.
Remember the prefix "ex-" means "out of" or "from," and "ista" relates to "standing"—so "a exista" literally means "to stand out" or "to be present."
Practice conjugations with phrases like "Eu exist" (I exist) and "Eu am existat" (I have existed) to get comfortable using the verb.
Connect the Romanian "a exista" with English words like "existence" and "existent" to build your vocabulary and reinforce meaning.
